case_title: MARGARET CURRIVAN-TANG VS. RACHEL S DORCY

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CERTIFIED MAILED CLAIM SENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD RECEIVED SIGNED REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL FROM PLAINTIFF. REQUEST DID NOT SPECIFY IF DISMISSAL IS WITH OR WITHOUT PREJUDICE. FORM RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF FOR COMPLETION.
